fields.title: optional: pi core API - expose discovered skills to extensions
fields.description:
Optional upstream improvement (pi-mono): expose the discovered skills list (name/description/path) to extensions via ExtensionContext or ExtensionAPI.

Rationale:
- Extension currently must re-run discoverSkills() and may not respect CLI --skills filtering.
- A first-class API would make $skill autocomplete/injection consistent with pi core.

DoD:
- Proposed API shape documented in issue (and implemented if we choose to upstream).
- If implemented: minimal tests + docs update in pi-mono.
fields.notes: Optional upstream pi-mono API improvement; extension works without it.
